# Mother Hospitals & IVF Center

> Best IVF & Fertility Hospital in Boduppal, Hyderabad. Founded by Dr. E. Prashanthi Reddy (MBBS, DGO, PG Diploma ART – Kiel University, Germany). 19+ years experience. ART Act 2021 certified.

## About

Mother Hospitals & IVF Center is a fertility and maternity hospital located in Boduppal, Hyderabad, Telangana, India. The hospital specialises in IVF (In Vitro Fertilisation), needleless IVF, natural cycle IVF, infertility treatment, obstetrics and gynaecology, and cosmetic gynaecology.

**Founder & Medical Director:** Dr. E. Prashanthi Reddy
**Qualifications:** MBBS (Mamatha Medical College, Khammam), DGO (Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad), PG Diploma in ART – Kiel University, Germany
**TGMC Registration:** 50624
**Experience:** 19+ years
**Google Rating:** 4.7★ (500+ reviews)

## Services

- IVF (Test Tube Baby Treatment)
- Needleless IVF – pain-free IVF without conventional injections
- Natural Cycle IVF – IVF without hormonal stimulation
- IUI (Intrauterine Insemination)
- ICSI (Intracytoplasmic Sperm Injection)
- Low AMH Treatment
- Recurrent IVF Failure Treatment
- ERA Test (Endometrial Receptivity Assay)
- Laser Assisted Hatching
- Egg Freezing / Embryo Freezing / Semen Freezing
- TESA / PESA (Surgical Sperm Retrieval)
- Maternity – Normal Delivery & C-Section
- High Risk Pregnancy Care
- PCOS / PCOD Treatment
- Laparoscopy & Hysteroscopy
- Cosmetic Gynaecology & Vaginal Tightening
- Mother 9 Card – Antenatal Package (₹9,999/-)

## Current Offer

All-inclusive IVF Package: ₹99,000/- (includes stimulation injections, OPU, ICSI, consultations, scans). Valid till 30 June 2026.

- **Website:** https://motherhospitals.co.in

## Areas Served

Boduppal, Uppal, Ghatkesar, Malkajgiri, Nacharam, Habsiguda, Tarnaka, ECIL, Kapra, Kushaiguda, Yapral, Dammaiguda, Keesara, Alwal, Secunderabad, Nagole, LB Nagar, Kothapet, Dilsukhnagar, Medipally, Peerzadiguda, and across Telangana.

## Certifications & Awards

- ART (Assisted Reproductive Technology) Regulation Act 2021 – Certified
- STV Suman TV Doctor Award
- Gufic Biosciences Certificate of Appreciation
- AICOG 2024 – 20 ICOG Credit Points
- UKSH Masters in IUI & IVF
- PG Diploma in ART & Reproductive Medicine – Kiel University, Germany
- Advanced Laparoscopy Training – Satwalekar Institute, Hyderabad
